channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Ready or Not 2: Here I Come review — the sequel is convoluted and full of carnage, but saved by star power
item.description: Ready or Not 2 may seem like a pointless sequel but it's worth watching to see the cast having the time of their lives.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for March 21, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for March 21, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for March 21, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1736 on March 21 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.
